Petition For Authority To Administer Decedents Estate Under The Independent Administration Of Estates Act
Off Calendar May-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 17, 2022 is admitted to probate. Lori Go is appointed as the Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
